newsSince: In June 2026 Neo Performance Materials formally inaugurated Europe's largest permanent-magnet plant in Estonia (built in <500 days), shipped first magnet samples to a motor customer, and was awarded a new rare-earth permanent-magnet supply contract; it also declared a $0.10 dividend (ex-date June 22). This follows April's heavy-rare-earth separation line commissioning at Silmet. These are genuine commercialization milestones for the ex-China magnet supply chain feeding motors/robotics.

sources.label: Neo opens Narva NdFeB magnet facility (ProjectBlue)
Neo ships magnet samples to motor customer
Neo opens Europe's largest magnet facility (InvestorNews)
Neo wins traction motor award in Europe (Neo Materials)

verdicts.rankRationale: No new news since June 9. Magnet supply-chain relevance to humanoid motors intact but indirect; +106% YTD, $1.1B cap means crowding/scale already argue for modest weight per prior case. Nothing inflects the humanoid-stack alpha, hold.
verdicts.bull: Only ex-China NdFeB magnet maker scaling in Europe; structural motor-magnet supply node for robotics/EV.
verdicts.neutral: Relevant but indirect to humanoids; large prior move already prices much of the story.
verdicts.bear: Rare-earth price/tariff swings, large cap and crowding cut alpha vs pure humanoid-stack names.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New Tier-1 magnet supply contracts / Estonia ramp milestones
verdicts.primaryRisk: Rare-earth price normalization or China export-policy reversal
